items.key: (@@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

command.text: declare @periodCount int select @periodCount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_hr_so_ky' select 'this._periodCount=' + rtrim(@periodCount) + ';active$SalaryComputingPeriod(this);' as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin kỳ tính lương đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ma_bp = @ma_bp and ky = @ky and nam = @nam) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, @$exists as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_bp = $ma_bp.OldValue and ky = $ky.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if exists(select * from @@table where ma_bp = @ma_bp and nam = @nam and ky = @ky and not (ma_bp = $ma_bp.OldValue and ky = $ky.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue)) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, @$exists as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_bp = @ma_bp and ky = @ky and nam = @nam
